data.title: Sunstone Hotel Investors to release Q4 & full year 2025 earnings on Feb 27, 2026. Trading as SHO on NYSE.
data.description: Aliso Viejo, California - Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc. (NYSE: SHO) disclosed plans to release their financial performance for Q4 and the entire year of 2025 on February 27, 2026, prior to market opening. The organization, commonly referred to as Sunstone, stated that their management team will host the announcement.

data.title: EHang appoints Shuai Feng as CTO to enhance innovation; effective Jan. 14, 2026. A key step in advancing tech management.
data.description: EHang Holdings Limited, a prominent player in advanced air mobility technology, recently disclosed the appointment of Mr. Shuai Feng as the Chief Technology Officer, effective since January 14, 2026. This strategic move was approved by the Board of Directors, signifying a significant step in the Company's technology roadmap. Under the guidance of Founder, Chairman, and CEO Mr. Huazhi Hu, EHang has fostered a strong technological base over the years. The ascension of Mr. Feng is expected to further bolster the Company's technology management approach, emphasizing innovation and practical application in the industry.

data.title: Vivos Therapeutics reveals exercise of warrants, bringing in $4.64M in gross proceeds.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the global economy is expected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, marking a significant improvement from the contraction of 3.5% seen in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The growth is attributed to the increasing vaccinations rates and government stimulus packages. However, the recovery is uneven across regions, with advanced economies projected to grow by 5.4% while emerging and developing economies are expected to expand by 6%. Inflation rates are also anticipated to rise in several countries, with the United States experiencing the highest forecasted inflation rate of 3.5%. The report emphasizes the importance of continued support from governments and central banks to ensure a stable and inclusive recovery.

data.title: Tembo partners with HMBEV in $11B Australian utility truck market to boost sales, aiming for $838M spin-off.
data.description: The goal of the partnership is to boost market acceptance and sales in the crucial Australian market, as Tembo advances towards its potential spin-off valued at US$838 million through a public listing.

data.title: RNWF and Kepler Fusion Tech reveal white paper on Texatron™ Aneutronic Fusion Platform, outlining architecture and commercialization.
data.description: Last weekend, a major fire broke out in a commercial building in downtown causing extensive damage. The incident occurred on Saturday evening around 8 p.m. and took several hours for firefighters to bring it under control. Approximately 50 firefighters were at the scene, trying to extinguish the blaze that engulfed multiple floors of the structure. Thankfully, no injuries were reported, but the building suffered significant structural damage. The cause of the fire is still under investigation, and the estimated cost of the damage is around $1 million. The local authorities are urging nearby residents and businesses to remain cautious as investigations continue and cleanup efforts get underway.

data.title: AutoNation will release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb. 6, 2026, before the market opens. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET. Phone: 833-470-1428.
data.description: AutoNation, Inc. stated that it will disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 6, 2026, prior to the market's opening. The management intends to address these results and provide additional details about the company in a conference call and audio webcast on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can join the conference call via telephone at 833-470-1428 (Conference ID: 817116).

data.title: Lyten introduces new concrete admixture for infrastructure, promising strength and durability without production changes or cost increase.
data.description: A company named Lyten, known for its invention of Lyten 3D Graphene™, has revealed its move into the worldwide concrete industry. The launch of their new product, Lyten S Cure™, marks their entry into the market. Lyten S Cure™ is a concrete admixture specifically designed to enhance the strength, durability, and speed of infrastructure construction. What sets this product apart is that it achieves these improvements without the need for alterations to current production methods or an increase in expenses. This new development represents Lyten's expansion into its third significant industrial sector, showcasing its unique supermaterial technology.

data.title: Most popular home on Redfin in 2025: 5-bed, 3.5-bath house in Silicon Valley viewed 35k times in 1 day, sold for $5.6M.
data.description: In 2025, a recently renovated 5-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom Spanish-style residence located in Silicon Valley garnered significant attention on Redfin.com, as reported by Redfin, a real estate brokerage associated with Rocket. This property became the most sought-after home on the website, receiving nearly 35,000 views within only one day of being listed. It ultimately sold for $5.6 million, surpassing its initial list price of $4.8 million by $740,000. This impressive sale highlights the high demand and competitiveness within the housing market during that period.

data.title: Private Bancorp of America reported net income of $10.0 million in Q4 2025, with earnings per share at $1.71. Total deposits were $2.22 billion, and Tangible book value per share was $45.75. Net interest margin was 4.84%, and provision for credit losses was $2.6 million. In FY 2025, net income was $40.7 million, with diluted earnings per share at $6.92. Loans held-for-investment were $2.13 billion, and total deposits were $2.22 billion. Noninterest expense was $15.7 million, efficiency ratio was 48.46%, and provision for income tax expense was $4.2 million. Total assets were $2.54 billion, and total liabilities were $2.27 billion with shareholders' equity at $263.96 million.
data.description: Private Bancorp of America, Inc. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, with a net income of $10.0 million, representing a return on average assets of 1.53%. Diluted earnings per share were $1.71, while core deposits were $2.16 billion, and total deposits were $2.22 billion. Net interest margin was 4.84%, with loans held-for-investment at $2.13 billion. For the full year 2025, net income was $40.7 million, a 13.5% increase from the previous year, with a return on average assets of 1.61%. Core deposits saw a 13.9% increase, reaching $1.89 billion. The Bank's capital ratios were also above the levels for "well capitalized" institutions. The bank initiated a stock repurchase program in 2025 and was ranked among the Top 20 community banks in the US. CalPrivate Bank was recognized for its outstanding services, with an emphasis on client satisfaction and innovative banking solutions. The bank's total assets were $2.54 billion as of December 31, 2025.

data.title: Coinbase to reveal Q4 and FY 2025 finances on Feb 12, 2026, after market close. Webcast at 2:30 p.m. PT. Replay available.
data.description: Washington- Remote-first company Coinbase Global, Inc. disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 12, 2026, after market closure. The company is set to conduct a webcast at 2:30 p.m. PT on the same day to elaborate on its financial outcomes. An archive of the webcast will be made available following the event, along with a written transcript, accessible on the Investor Relations website.

data.title: Bitcoin is a more scarce asset than gold due to its fixed supply, states Ark Invest CEO's 2026 report.
data.description: The CEO of Ark Invest claims in their 2026 Outlook report that Bitcoin's limited supply positions it as a more valuable scarce asset compared to gold, especially as demand increases.

data.title: Duke Energy offers tips and programs for energy efficiency in cold weather. Subscribers get a $150 bill credit plus $50 annually with smart thermostat enrollment. Flex Savings Option rate for lower energy costs.
data.description: Take advantage of valuable rewards and savings by participating in our program. Receive a $150 credit towards your initial bill when you enroll a qualifying smart thermostat, and enjoy an additional $50 annually. By signing up for the Flex Savings Option rate, you can reduce your energy expenses by adjusting your energy consumption. This opportunity is available in Charlotte, N.C., with the program launching on January 16, 2026. Join now to benefit from these incentives and lower your rates.

data.title: 5th Seed to Spoon Summit in Ohio on June 17-18, 2026, will empower attendees on food, health, future with CEO Kelly McKenna.
data.description: Attendees can look forward to the upcoming 5th annual Seed to Spoon Summit on June 17-18, 2026, in SUGARCREEK, Ohio. The summit will have Kelly McKenna, CEO of End Chronic Disease, along with various experts who will empower participants to take control of their food, health, and future. The event is set to provide valuable insights to those in attendance. Mark your calendars for this exciting opportunity on the horizon!
